DEFAULT.msg: An error occurred while processing your request.

ECONNREFUSED.msg: A network error occurred while processing your request.

MT_RET_ERR_NETWORK.msg: A network error occurred while processing your request.

MT_RET_ERR_TIMEOUT.msg: A timeout occurred while processing your request.

MT_RET_ERROR.msg: An error occurred while processing your request with the trading platform.

MT_RET_ERR_DATA.msg: Unable to perform request due to bad data.

MT_RET_ERR_DISK.msg: Unable to perform request due to the trading platform being unavailable.

MT_RET_ERR_MEM.msg: Unable to perform request due to the trading platform being unavailable.

MT_RET_ERR_PERMISSIONS.msg: Unable to perform request due to insufficient permissions.

MT_RET_ERR_NOSERVICE.msg: Unable to perform request due to the trading platform being unavailable.

MT_RET_ERR_CONNECTION.msg: A network error occurred while processing your request.

MT_RET_ERR_FREQUENT.msg: Velocity of requests is too high.

MT_RET_ERR_NOTFOUND.msg: Unable to process request due to invalid trading platform endpoint.

MT_RET_ERR_PARTIAL.msg: Unable to process request due to partial trading platform error.

MT_RET_ERR_SHUTDOWN.msg: Unable to process request due to trading platform shutdown in progress.

MT_RET_ERR_CANCEL.msg: Unable to process request, Operation has been canceled.

MT_RET_ERR_DUPLICATE.msg: Unable to process request due to duplicate data.

MT_RET_AUTH_ACCOUNT_INVALID.msg: Unable to process request due to invalid account.

MT_RET_USR_LOGIN_PROHIBITED.msg: Account login unavailable due to being reserved on another trading platform server.

MT_RET_USR_LIMIT_REACHED.msg: Account limit reached, unable to proceed.

MT_RET_USR_HAS_TRADES.msg: Unable to process request due to account having open trades.

MT_RET_USR_DIFFERENT_SERVERS.msg: Unable to move account to different trading platform server.

MT_RET_USR_DIFFERENT_CURRENCY.msg: Unable to move account to different currency group.

MT_RET_USR_ACCOUNT_EXIST.msg: Unable to process request due to account already existing.

MT_RET_TRADE_LIMIT_REACHED.msg: Unable to process trade due to limit reached.

MT_RET_TRADE_MAX_MONEY.msg: Unable to process trade due to money limit reached.

MT_RET_TRADE_DEAL_EXIST.msg: Unable to process trade due to trade already existing.

MT_RET_TRADE_ORDER_EXIST.msg: Unable to process trade due to trade already existing.

MT_RET_TRADE_ORDER_PROHIBITED.msg: Unable to process trade due to trade ticket reserved at another trading platform server.

MT_RET_TRADE_DEAL_PROHIBITED.msg: Unable to process trade due to trade ticket reserved at another trading platform server.

MT_RET_REPORT_NOTSUPPORTED.msg: Unable to process request due to unsupported report.

MT_RET_REPORT_NODATA.msg: Unable to process request due to no report data.

MT_RET_REPORT_TEMPLATE_BAD.msg: Unable to process request due to bad report template.

MT_RET_REPORT_INVALID_ROW.msg: Unable to process request due to invalid row.

MT_RET_REPORT_LIMIT_REPEAT.msg: Unable to process request due to tag repeat limit reached.

MT_RET_REPORT_LIMIT_REPORT.msg: Unable to process request due to report size limit reached.

MT_RET_REQUEST_REJECT.msg: Unable to process request due trading platform request rejection.

MT_RET_REQUEST_CANCEL.msg: Unable to process request due trading platform request cancellation.

MT_RET_REQUEST_ERROR.msg: An error occurred on the trading platform while processing your request.

MT_RET_REQUEST_TIMEOUT.msg: A trading platform timeout occurred while processing your request.

MT_RET_REQUEST_INVALID.msg: Invalid request, rejected by trading platform.

MT_RET_REQUEST_INVALID_VOLUME.msg: Unable to process request due to bad volume.

MT_RET_REQUEST_INVALID_PRICE.msg: Unable to process request due to bad prices.

MT_RET_REQUEST_INVALID_STOPS.msg: Unable to process request due to bad stops.

MT_RET_REQUEST_TRADE_DISABLED.msg: Unable to process request due to disallowed trading.

MT_RET_REQUEST_MARKET_CLOSED.msg: Unable to process request due to market closed.

MT_RET_REQUEST_NO_MONEY.msg: Unable to process request due to insufficient balance.

MT_RET_REQUEST_PRICE_CHANGED.msg: Unable to process request due to price change.

MT_RET_REQUEST_PRICE_OFF.msg: Unable to process request due to no price.

MT_RET_REQUEST_INVALID_EXP.msg: Unable to process request due to invalid order expiration

MT_RET_REQUEST_ORDER_CHANGED.msg: Unable to process request due to order having been changed already.

MT_RET_REQUEST_TOO_MANY.msg: Unable to process request due to to many requests.

MT_RET_REQUEST_AT_DISABLED_SERVER.msg: Auto trading disabled by the trading platform.

MT_RET_REQUEST_AT_DISABLED_CLIENT.msg: Auto trading disabled by the client.

MT_RET_REQUEST_FROZEN.msg: Modification failed due to order or position being close to market. Order or position frozen.

MT_RET_REQUEST_CONNECTION.msg: Unable to process due to bad connection.

MT_RET_REQUEST_LIMIT_ORDERS.msg: Unable to process due to limit on the number of orders reached.

MT_RET_REQUEST_LIMIT_VOLUME.msg: Unable to process due to limit volume of orders reached.

MT_RET_REQUEST_INVALID_ORDER.msg: Unable to process due to invalid or prohibited order type.

MT_RET_REQUEST_POSITION_CLOSED.msg: Unable to process, position is already closed or doesn't exist.

MT_RET_REQUEST_INVALID_CLOSE_VOLUME.msg: Unable to process, volume to be closed exceeds the current volume of the position.

MT_RET_REQUEST_CLOSE_ORDER_EXIST.msg: Unable to process, order to close the position already exists.

MT_RET_REQUEST_LIMIT_POSITIONS.msg: Unable to process due to orders limit reached.

MT_RET_REQUEST_LONG_ONLY.msg: Unable to process trade due to only BUY orders being allowed.

MT_RET_REQUEST_SHORT_ONLY.msg: Unable to process trade due to only SELL orders being allowed.

MT_RET_REQUEST_CLOSE_ONLY.msg: Unable to process trade due to only closing orders being allowed.

MT_RET_REQUEST_PROHIBITED_BY_FIFO.msg: Unable to process trade due to order being prohibited by fifo rule.

MT_RET_ERR_NOTIMPLEMENT.msg: An error occurred while processing your request.

MT_RET_ERR_NOTMAIN.msg: Unable to proceed, operation must be performed on main trading platform server.

MT_RET_ERR_NOTSUPPORTED.msg: An error occurred while processing your request.

MT_RET_ERR_DEADLOCK.msg: An error occurred while processing your request, deadlock detected.

MT_RET_ERR_LOCKED.msg: An error occurred while processing your request, locked entity detected.
